name: text
summary: Specifies translation of any default Therion text in output.

arguments.raw: <language ID> = standard ISO language identifier (e.g. en or en_GB)
arguments.name: <language ID>
arguments.description: standard ISO language identifier (e.g. en or en_GB)

arguments.raw: <therion text> = therion text to translate. For list of therion texts and available translations, see thlang/texts.txt file.
arguments.name: <therion text>
arguments.description: therion text to translate. For list of therion texts and available translations, see thlang/texts.txt file.
